auditSources.contribution: OG/icon gap (P1), metadata-standardization (P2), llms.txt CV claim to verify (P3), deferred marketing pages; Organization/WebSite + llms.txt fixes applied
Closed P0/P1 (404, middleware, robots, sitemap); deferred a11y, deep-page back links, BreadcrumbList/HowTo JSON-LD, content gaps, E2E tests
0 findings, 0 critical (no public secret vars, no unsanitized HTML, no eval, no hardcoded keys)
Gitleaks, npm audit (fail on critical), lint/typecheck, custom scanner
Surface counts (9 published / 5 draft SEO pages, 6 tools, 2 challenges, 6 emails); KPI table empty -> measurement gap
Content/outreach cadence; drafts only, manual posting (no auto-posting policy)
4-tier launch backlog (DB, AI key, deploy, legal, payments, monitoring, RLS, deletion, moat items)
Owner manual steps: key rotation, GitHub security switches, RLS/storage, ADMIN/CRON secrets, pro-reference verification, legal review
Privacy posture, youth handling, claims avoided, needs-legal-review-before-scale
Content calendar, GSC setup, backlink strategy, on-page checklist, tracking targets
Script catalog, CI map, a11y lint posture (7 rules at warn), no-auto-publish policy
Workflow detail, branch-protection settings, Dependabot, custom rule table

auditSources.schedule: one-time implementation (sitemap registry + HTML sitemap + GSC docs)
auditSources.contribution: Shipped HTML sitemap at /sitemap + curated URL registry (shared XML/HTML source of truth); docs/seo/* (GSC checklist, top-20 priority URLs, tiered indexation, weekly monitoring, cannibalization report). Opened F-30..F-36 (6 blog/guide cannibalization decisions + GSC submission).

consolidatedFindings.finding: og-default.png, icon-192.png, icon-512.png referenced but absent from apps/web/public (verified: only robots.txt + llms.txt present)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Blank link previews on every share; no favicon; PWA not installable; Org logo in JSON-LD 404s
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Metadata, JSON-LD logo, manifest reference non-existent assets
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Add real artwork or implement app/opengraph-image.tsx + app/icon.tsx (brand green #1a3a2a, SQ wordmark)

consolidatedFindings.finding: ~16 public marketing pages mid-edit (theme tokenization) skipped by the SEO audit
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Delays consistent branding + re-audit coverage
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Uncommitted working tree blocks safe automated edits
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Commit theme-tokenization work, then re-audit + tokenize those pages

consolidatedFindings.finding: Sport-analysis & other pages hand-roll metadata + JSON-LD instead of buildMetadata()/jsonLd.ts
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Inconsistent canonicals/Twitter cards; weaker Org linkage; drift risk
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Duplicated SEO logic; some pages lack explicit canonical
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Migrate hand-rolled pages onto shared helpers

consolidatedFindings.finding: llms.txt claims SwingVantage does not do computer-vision pixel analysis; may conflict with live AI-vision analyzer
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Inaccurate claim erodes trust + AI-engine accuracy
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Capability statement out of sync with shipped feature
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Verify against current video analyzer; correct the claim

consolidatedFindings.finding: No skip-to-content link; focus rings only Tailwind default; no breadcrumb component
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Harder for keyboard/screen-reader users; WCAG gap
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: AppShell lacks skip target; no Breadcrumbs component
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Add skip-link to AppShell, standardize visible focus, build breadcrumb component

consolidatedFindings.finding: /sessions/import/image and /sessions/log lack back links (dead-end risk)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Users can get stuck mid-workflow
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Missing return navigation on deep pages
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Add back/return links

consolidatedFindings.finding: Conflict: staged audit says /features, /resources, /glossary not created; strategy doc lists glossary/blog/features/benchmarks as built
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Missed long-tail/AEO coverage if gaps remain
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Verify which hub pages exist now; fill remaining gaps; run monthly content calendar

consolidatedFindings.finding: BreadcrumbList + HowTo JSON-LD deferred on sport-analysis pages
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Fewer rich-result/answer-engine surfaces
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Schema builders exist but unused on these pages
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Add breadcrumb + HowTo schema (rides on F-05)

consolidatedFindings.finding: Site-wide Organization + WebSite nodes were missing; fixed on homepage
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Improves who-are-you signals for AI engines
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Other pages still lack Org linkage until F-03
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Spread Org linkage via F-03 standardization

consolidatedFindings.finding: llms.txt answer-page coverage was sparse; fixed (categorized full listing)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: More answer pages discoverable by AI crawlers
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Keep updated as pages ship

consolidatedFindings.finding: GitHub branch protection on master, secret scanning, Dependabot alerts/auto-updates, private vuln reporting not enabled
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: CI runs but does not gate merges; no auto dep fixes
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Protections are config-only until owner enables
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Flip the four switches in GitHub Settings

consolidatedFindings.finding: OpenAI API key was in a local plaintext file - treat as compromised
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Key abuse / unexpected billing risk
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Rotate key; update .env.local + Vercel

consolidatedFindings.finding: ADMIN_SECRET and CRON_SECRET not set for production
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Admin panel + cron endpoints unprotected if deployed without them
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Generate (openssl rand -hex 32); set in .env.local + Vercel

consolidatedFindings.finding: Supabase RLS migration + private storage buckets not yet applied
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Row-level data exposure once cloud is live
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Apply RLS SQL; set buckets to private

consolidatedFindings.finding: Privacy Policy + Terms are placeholders; no COPPA/GDPR/CCPA review
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Legal exposure before paid/youth scale
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Attorney review before commercial launch

consolidatedFindings.finding: No cloud delete-my-account-and-data flow or documented retention policy
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: COPPA/GDPR deletion-right gap once cloud accounts ship
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Deletion exists locally; cloud path missing
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Build account-deletion flow; document retention

consolidatedFindings.finding: Professional swing references use PLACEHOLDER_REQUIRES_ADMIN_VERIFICATION video IDs
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Reference library looks unfinished; trust dip
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Verify real YouTube IDs; set verified: true

consolidatedFindings.finding: No error monitoring (Sentry) or uptime monitoring configured
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Outages/errors invisible in production
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Add Sentry + uptime monitor before launch

consolidatedFindings.finding: Analytics not connected; growth-report KPI table is empty
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Cannot measure funnel, drop-off, or any KPI - blocks the growth loop
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: 30-event abstraction exists but no provider wired
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Connect GA4/PostHog/Plausible; set up GSC; fill KPIs

consolidatedFindings.finding: Core Web Vitals + live-crawl checks pending production deploy
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Unknown real-world performance/SEO health
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Run CWV + crawl after first deploy

consolidatedFindings.finding: Sitemap not yet submitted to Google Search Console / Bing
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Slower indexing/discovery
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Submit sitemap.xml post-deploy (~30 min)

consolidatedFindings.finding: OCR auto-extraction service built but inactive (needs API key integration)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Image-import friction (manual entry only)
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Service layer present, not wired to a provider
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Integrate OCR provider key; activate

consolidatedFindings.finding: No E2E navigation tests (Playwright)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Regressions in nav/journeys can slip through
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Add Playwright journey tests

consolidatedFindings.finding: 7 jsx-a11y rules set to warn (pre-existing violations); ~126 lint warnings
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Latent a11y issues remain
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Burn down the 7 warn-rules in older surfaces

consolidatedFindings.finding: AI Coach memory/session continuity not built; AI-enhancement backlog (latest model IDs, prompt caching, fallbacks)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Weaker retention moat; missed AI quality gains
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Per the monthly AI-audit spec (not yet run)
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Run the AI audit; add session-memory context

consolidatedFindings.finding: Email templates exist but no provider connected; no welcome sequence
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Lost re-engagement; leads not nurtured
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Connect provider; build welcome series

consolidatedFindings.finding: No payment processing (Stripe) implemented
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Cannot monetize
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Implement Stripe Checkout + webhooks before paid tier

consolidatedFindings.finding: Production HTTP security headers need post-deploy verification
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Misconfig could weaken CSP/clickjacking defense
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Headers reportedly set in middleware/next config
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Verify at securityheaders.com after deploy

consolidatedFindings.finding: Parse error seen in video/SportVideoAnalyzerContent.tsx during audit dev run; tsc now clean
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Possible transient/already-fixed
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: Confirm builds clean on the committed tree

consolidatedFindings.finding: Blog /blog/how-to-stop-topping-the-golf-ball has an IDENTICAL title to guide /golf/stop-topping-the-ball (same intent)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Two pages compete for the same query; split ranking signals
consolidatedFindings.technicalImpact: Editorial blog post + programmatic guide target identical keyword
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: guide is the canonical target - differentiate blog + cross-link, OR canonicalize blog->guide, OR noindex/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md

consolidatedFindings.finding: Blog /blog/how-to-fix-a-golf-slice near-duplicates guide /golf/fix-slice (same 'how to fix a slice' intent)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Keyword cannibalization on a primary term
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: differentiate (blog = '5 causes' explainer linking to the fix) OR canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md

consolidatedFindings.finding: Blog /blog/slow-pitch-softball-stop-popping-up overlaps guide /softball/stop-popping-up (same intent)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Split ranking signals on a softball query
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: pick one primary, cross-link the other (or canonicalize/merge). See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md

consolidatedFindings.finding: Blog /blog/how-to-stop-rolling-over-in-baseball overlaps guide /baseball/stop-rolling-over (same intent)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Keyword cannibalization on a baseball query
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: pick one primary, cross-link/canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md

consolidatedFindings.finding: Blog /blog/pickleball-third-shot-drop-guide duplicates the topic of guide /pickleball-third-shot-drop
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Two pages on the same pickleball topic compete
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: guide is the silo page - differentiate/cross-link OR canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md

consolidatedFindings.finding: Blog /blog/padel-bandeja-explained duplicates the topic of guide /padel-bandeja
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Two pages on the same padel topic compete
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: guide is the silo page - differentiate/cross-link OR canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md

consolidatedFindings.finding: New sitemap.xml + HTML sitemap (/sitemap) + top-20 priority URLs need Google Search Console submission (extends F-21)
consolidatedFindings.businessImpact: Faster discovery/indexing of the refreshed URL set
consolidatedFindings.recommendation: OWNER: submit sitemap.xml, then inspect/request-index the first 20. Runbook: docs/seo/gsc-submission-checklist.md + docs/seo/priority-submit-urls.md (provisional list, pending approval)

topInsights.title: Ship missing share image + app icons
topInsights.expectedImpact: Higher share CTR, installable PWA, complete brand/knowledge signals
topInsights.successMetric: Non-blank link preview; favicon visible; Lighthouse PWA installable passes

topInsights.title: Connect analytics + Google Search Console
topInsights.expectedImpact: Funnel visibility; populated KPIs; indexing insight
topInsights.successMetric: Events in provider dashboard; sitemap Success in GSC

topInsights.title: Enable the four GitHub security switches
topInsights.expectedImpact: CI becomes an enforced merge gate; auto dep fixes
topInsights.successMetric: Merges to master blocked unless security-audit + CodeQL pass

topInsights.title: Rotate OpenAI key + set production secrets
topInsights.expectedImpact: Removes key-abuse risk; protects admin/cron paths
topInsights.successMetric: Old key revoked; endpoints reject requests without the secret

topInsights.title: Add production observability (Sentry + uptime)
topInsights.successMetric: Test error in Sentry; uptime alert fires

topInsights.title: Close the accessibility baseline
topInsights.successMetric: Keyboard reaches main in one tab; a11y score up; breadcrumb rich results validate

topInsights.title: Legal review of Privacy + Terms
topInsights.expectedImpact: Reduced legal exposure before paid/youth scale

topInsights.title: Standardize metadata + schema on shared helpers
topInsights.expectedImpact: Consistent canonicals/cards; spread Org linkage; less drift
topInsights.successMetric: Every public page emits canonical + consistent OG/Twitter + Org link

topInsights.title: Verify + fix llms.txt computer-vision claim
topInsights.expectedImpact: Accurate self-description for trust + AI engines

topInsights.title: Lock down cloud data before it exists
topInsights.expectedImpact: RLS + deletion ready before real/youth data lands
topInsights.successMetric: RLS denies cross-user reads; deletion removes all user rows in window

longTerm_90_plus_days: AI Coach memory as retention moat (F-25 extension)
Real pose-estimation video analysis at scale

technicalDebt.item: Hand-rolled metadata/JSON-LD instead of shared helpers

technicalDebt.remediation: Commit theme work; finish tokenization; re-audit

technicalDebt.item: 7 jsx-a11y rules at warn + ~126 lint warnings
technicalDebt.remediation: Incremental cleanup; promote rules to error as fixed

technicalDebt.item: Professional references use placeholder video IDs
technicalDebt.remediation: Verify real IDs; flip verified flags

technicalDebt.item: Possible transient parse error in SportVideoAnalyzerContent.tsx
technicalDebt.remediation: Confirm clean build on committed tree

technicalDebt.item: No cloud account-deletion flow / retention policy

stories.story: As a user sharing a link, I see a branded preview image
As a mobile user, I can install SwingVantage with a real icon
As the owner, I can see funnel + KPI data
acceptance: growth-report KPI table can be populated

stories.story: As the owner, I am alerted to errors and downtime
As the owner, my pages are indexed
Merges to master require passing security checks
Cloud data is protected by RLS + private buckets
Users can delete their account + all data
acceptance: deletion removes all user rows in stated window

stories.story: Every public page uses shared metadata/schema helpers
acceptance: all pages emit canonical + consistent OG/Twitter + Org link

stories.story: Sport pages emit BreadcrumbList + HowTo JSON-LD
llms.txt capability claims match the live analyzer
Keyboard users can skip to main content
acceptance: skip-link reaches main in one tab

stories.story: jsx-a11y warn-rules resolved in older surfaces
acceptance: 7 rules promoted to error with 0 violations

stories.story: Users can subscribe via Stripe with ToS acceptance + AI disclaimer
acceptance: Stripe Checkout + webhook verify payment server-side

stories.story: New signups receive a welcome email sequence

kpis.kpi: Organic clicks, impressions, avg position, indexed pages
kpis.target: Growing MoM; <10 avg position on primary keywords

kpis.kpi: Signup rate, email captures, report shares
AI Coach response success rate, fallback rate, rate-limit hits
Published vs draft SEO pages, tools, challenges

unresolvedQuestions.question: Does the current video analyzer perform computer-vision/pose analysis, contradicting the llms.txt claim? Project memory says it now uses real AI vision; llms.txt says it does not do pixel-level CV. Reconcile.
Which content-hub pages (/features, /resources, /glossary, /blog, /benchmarks) are actually routed and published today? The 2026-05-31 audit and the strategy doc disagree.
Is the SportVideoAnalyzerContent.tsx parse error fully resolved on the committed tree, or only on the in-progress working copy?
Are all intended security headers actually served in production (host-level), given OWNER_TASKS reports them set in middleware/next config?
Which analytics provider does the owner want (GA4 vs privacy-friendly Plausible vs PostHog)? Affects the privacy disclosure copy.
